steps.title: Translate the percentage statement into an equation
steps.content:
The phrase 432 is 96% of what number means that 432 equals 96% of an unknown value x. Write this as:
$$432 = 0.96x$$

steps.title: Set up the division to isolate x
Simplify the division
steps.content:
Convert 0.96 to a fraction: $0.96 = \frac{96}{100}$
$$x = \frac{432}{\frac{96}{100}} = 432 \times \frac{100}{96} = \frac{43200}{96} = 450$$
The answer is 450.
